name: copilot
description: Delegate coding tasks and code reviews to the local Copilot CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Run local Copilot tasks from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use your local Copilot CLI for rescue tasks, code review prompts, and tracked background jobs directly from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run Copilot setup and verify the local binary
Delegate this implementation task to local Copilot
Run a Copilot review over current git diff
